An '''Aqualish Sith''' was one of four of [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith|Order]] that [[Ambush on Daluuj|ambushed]] four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—including [[Ahn Rasi Tuum]], [[Wolf Sazen]], and [[Shado Vao]]—on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daluuj/Legends|Daluuj]] in [[137 ABY]]. He was [[Sai tok/Legends|cut in two]] at the torso by Master Sazen during the skirmish.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] {{1st}}
